title: AWS Copilot and AWS VPN
author: Mihael Veber
text:
I am using the AWS Copilot system to deploy microservices. I have encountered an issue where I need a static IP for the services deployed in ECS due to a Site-to-Site VPN. I am interested in how I can configure Copilot to assign a static IP to a service deployed in ECS, as this is necessary for firewalls. This IP must also be part of the CIDRs defined by the VPN Site-to-Site.
Best regards, Mihael
I just need answer if this is possible or not,.. Or I must deploy my service to EC2 in AWS
